name: American Water Works Company, Inc.
description: American Water Works Company, Inc. is the largest publicly traded water and wastewater utility company in the United States. Founded in 1886, the company provides regulated and regulated-like water and wastewater services to approximately 14 million people in 14 states. It operates through its subsidiaries, offering drinking water, wastewater treatment, and water system management services to residential, commercial, industrial, and public authority customers, ensuring safe, clean, affordable, and reliable water services.
